---
name: Provider / model request
about: Request support for a new LLM provider or model
labels: provider
assignees: ''
---

## Provider or model

Name and homepage of the provider or model.

## API compatibility

- [ ] OpenAI-compatible (`/v1/chat/completions`)
- [ ] Custom API (link to docs)

## Why Cortex should support it

Use-case and user segment it would unlock.

## Authentication

How are API keys obtained? Any rate-limit or pricing constraints worth noting?

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] No, requesting only
